label: Smilies
summary: Turns :) and friends into pixel emoticons.
era: The forum smiley pack, type the code, see the face, running since the phpBB age.

classes.name: rs-smiley
classes.role: each emoticon image the parser inserts

options.name: scope
options.note: the subtree to parse; defaults to the host

options.name: src
options.note: override the smilies pack image URL (same-origin)

a11y: Each image's alt is the original typed code, so copy-paste and screen readers round-trip. The parser skips code, kbd, inputs, and any [data-rs-no-smilies] region.
